summary: AscendC aicore code is strict about float and unsigned-int casts. For fixed x2 bilinear upsample, replace generic floating coordinate conversion with integer parity branches and constant weights instead of static_cast<float>(uint32_t).

If bilinear weights are already correct in a standalone check but device verification still shows many mismatches, inspect the kernel's multi-core row scheduling. Pass the host-selected blockDim through tiling and stride work by that explicit value instead of relying on GetBlockNum().

summary: When using platform_ascendc::PlatformAscendC in host tiling code, include tiling/platform/platform_ascendc.h explicitly; otherwise host compilation fails even if the logic is correct.
